# FutureCandy

> FutureCandy is a digital-first AI pop studio creating synthetic artists, visual music drops, and future-facing pop content.

FutureCandy creates AI-powered pop music, develops digital-first artists, and manages a growing catalogue of songs, videos, artist identities, and collaboration enquiries.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, artist roster intro, visual world, and contact CTA.
- [Music](/music): Releases, tracks, and published music/video content.
- [Artists](/artists): Roster of FutureCandy digital-first artists.
- [Journal](/journal): Notes, drops, and behind-the-scenes writing.
- [Licensing & Collaboration](/collab): Working with FutureCandy on film, brand, and digital projects.
- [Partner Enquiry](/collab/enquire): Submit a collaboration or licensing request.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with FutureCandy.

## Legal

- [Digital Licensing](/digital-licensing): Digital content licensing terms.
- [Global Licensing](/global-licensing): Regional licensing framework.
- [Multilingual Rights](/multilingual-rights): Translated master recordings and rights.
- [Terms of Use](/terms): Site terms.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle data.
- [Cookies Policy](/cookies): Cookie usage.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund terms.
